title: Olivia Samuel 20 x Pirate Party Birthday Invitations from Postcard Style with envelopes
features: PIRATE BIRTHDAY PARTY INVITATIONS - PACK OF 20 ⭐ Swashbuckling Colourful Pirate Logo Design ⭐ Professionally printed both sides
EXTRA THICK CARDSTOCK⭐ Printed on high quality 300gsm triple coated cardstock ⭐ Front of card has an elegant sheen ⭐ Reverse of card has a matt finish for ease of writing.
SIZE ⭐ These cards measure A6 in size (105 x 148mm)
ENVELOPES INCLUDED ⭐ These invitations come with 20 quality white lick and seal 100gsm envelopes
ECO FRIENDLY & UK MANUFACTURED ⭐ Our factory runs on 100% renewable energy. Our cardstock is sustainably sourced and the cards are fully recyclable.
description: A pack of 20 high quality pirate party birthday invitation cards and envelopes. The design has a swashbuckling skull and cutlass design on the front and further pirate themed imagery on the reverse. The A6 cards are ready for you to write your party details on the back. Printed and packaged in the UK by Olivia Samuel.
